---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## What happened

A clear description of what went wrong.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## How to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Environment

- OS (Control machine):
- OS (slave machine, if relevant):
- Python version: `python --version`
- SimPit version: `pip show simpit | grep Version`

## Logs

Please attach or paste relevant logs:

- Slave: `agent.log` (path printed at slave startup)
- Control: copy from the activity log panel (or `Save log` if a
  shareable export button is available in your version)

```
(paste here)
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, network setup, recent
changes to your scripts, etc.
